message:
refactor: const fn upgrade + numeric literal formatting

- connectors/openai/client: promote with_retry_config to const fn
  since it only does field assignment
- fcp-sdk/error_contract_tests: use numeric separator (5_000) for
  readability in Duration assertion

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -119,7 +119,7 @@ impl OpenAIClient {
 
     /// Set retry configuration.
     #[must_use]
-    pub fn with_retry_config(
+    pub const fn with_retry_config(
         mut self,
         max_retries: u32,
         initial_delay_ms: u64,
